caption: An animated sequence begins with a dark, shadowy silhouette of a globe against a deep blue background. As the scene progresses, the globe becomes more illuminated and centered, and the word "POLICY" appears in a white, serif typeface across the middle of the sphere. The visual then shifts to incorporate a stylized map of the world in the background. Finally, the animation culminates in a title screen where the text expands to reveal the full name "WORLD POLICY CONFERENCE". Below this, smaller white text reads "16TH EDITION", "GLOBAL GOVERNANCE", and "November 2-5, 2023 • Abu Dhabi". The color palette remains a consistent range of deep blues and whites throughout the progression of the sequence.
